item.title: gollum version5
item.description: 概要 個人wikiのgollumのversionが4.1.4 to 5.0.1 ver4のままだと動かないので色々直す必要がある 参考 https://github.com/gollum/gollum/wiki/5.0-release-notes 基本的にこれを読めば解決

item.title: About me
item.description: 日本語ページ Profile Satoshi Tanaka Apr. 2020 - Now Tier IV, Inc. Autonomous Driving Perception Algorithms Engineer Biography Work Experience Apr. 2020 - Now Tier IV, Inc. Autonomous Driving Perception Algorithms Engineer Internship Apr. 2018 - Apr. 2019 Internship at Preferred Networks, Inc. as a part-time engineer Aug. 2017 - Mar. 2018 Internship at Hitachi, Ltd as a research assistant Academic background Master’s Degree in Information

item.title: Publication
item.description: Research Field Robotics, Computer Vision System integration of high-speed robot using 1000fps high-speed image processing Deformation Control, robot force control for dynamic manipulation Application of high-speed visual control for logistics, Unmanned Aerial Vehicle(UAV) International Conference (First Author) Satoshi Tanaka, Taku Senoo, and Masatoshi Ishikawa: Non-Stop Handover of Parcel to Airborne UAV Based on High-Speed Visual Object Tracking, 2019 19th International Conference on Advanced Robotics (ICAR) (Belo Horizonte, 2019.

item.title: 研究成果
item.description: 研究分野 人間より器用かつ速くタスクを達成する，物理世界とインタラクションする自動ロボットシステムの構築 ロボット工学, コンピュータビジョン 10

item.title: 自己紹介
item.description: Profile 田中 敬(たなか さとし) 2020⁄04-Now 株式会社ティアフォー Perception Engineer Biography Work Experience 2020⁄04-Now 株式会社ティアフォー Perception Engineer Internship 2018⁄04-2019⁄03 Preferred Networks Part-time Engineer 2017⁄08-2018⁄03 株式会社日立製作所 研究補助員 Academic background 2018⁄04-2020⁄03 東京大学大

item.title: Page layout collapse in gollum ver5
item.description: Error For user of custom css gollum –css When gollum updates from version 4 to version5, page layout collapses In particular, _Sidebar is very narrow and rendored in left side. How to fix delete cashe on browser When using Google chrome, Ctrl-f5 Reference Other information of gollum ver5.0 https://github.com/gollum/gollum/wiki/5.0-release-notes

item.title: オウロ・プレットへの行き方
item.description: 概要 ブラジルのベロオリゾンテ(Belo Horizonte)からオウロ・プレット(Ouro Preto)への行き方でバスを使わない方法について 2

item.title: Interest
item.description: Soccer I have played soccer for over 15 years. I play as attacker, mainly Second Top and Side Midfielder. History I like Romance of the Three Kingdoms(三国志) and the age of provincial wars in Japan(戦国時代). As a person, I like Du Yu(杜預)

item.title: Robocon
item.description: RoboTech(2014-2017) RoboTech, the team for robot contest at The University of Tokyo. Belonged to mechanic section. worked as the team leader of RoboTech in 2016 winner of National Championships(NHK Robocon), and participated in the international robot contest “ABU Robocon2016” as Representation from Japan At ABU Robocon2016, We were 2nd-RunnerUp and we were commened for ABU Robocon award.

item.title: Setting Velocity on Joints and Links for Gazebo ver9.6
item.description: 概要 Setting Velocity on Joints and Links (Gazebo ver7.0)をGazebo version 9.6 で動くようにした https://github.com/scepter914/set_vel_plugin Github やったこと 流石にROSを少し触った方がいいんじゃないかと思い， 「勉強が

item.title: TelloFollowingPerson: ChainerCVを使った，Object Detectionして人に付いていくトイドローンのアプリケーション
item.description: 概要 ChainerCVのdetection example + tellopyでトイドローンを自動で動かしてみたお話 アプリケーションとしては人についていくもの

item.title: Tensegrity Simulation
item.description: What is this Blog of https://github.com/scepter914/Tensegrity-simulation Methods Sequence Initialize position of particles and parameters Loop Initialize force of each particle Update force of each particle from spring Update position of each particle Satisfy distance constraints of each strut Update collision of ground Each Particles f = Mg Spring $f=K_s(l-l_0)d+K_d(v_1・d-v_0・d)d$ $K_s$ : spring constant $l$ : current length $l_0$ : rest length $d$ : unit vector toward the other particle $K_d$ : damper constant $v_0$,$v_1$ : velocity of particles Update particles Verlet Integration $x_{n+1} ← $ $ xn+(xn-x_{n-1})+Δt^2F_n/m$ xn is $x_n$ (it is rendering error) Strut $x_0$ ← $(x_0 + x_1)/2.

item.title: VimのノーマルモードでEnter押すとカーソル位置に改行を入れるようにする
item.description: やりたいこと @にカーソルがあるとして， abcd@efghij から @abcd efghij にする． 続けてoを打てば abcd @ efghij となって便利 解決法 .vimrcに nnoremap <CR> i<Return><Esc>^k を書く. するとノーマルモ
